title: Oairse 3PCS Plant Pots Outdoor Galvanised Planter Zinc Plant Pot Garden Planters Metal Plant Pots Vintage Round Bucket Flower Pot Rustic Container for Plant or Decorative Home Modern Farmhouse Indoor
features: Vintage Zinc Planters - This gold Galvanized planter perfect for any modern, party, wedding, farmhouse, and rustic home furnishings thanks to its distressed style and design. A set of 3 metal iron flower pots, vintage color and well-made, adds a bright and happy touch to your little terrace garden and fence.

High Quality - These plant pots outdoor made of high quality metal which makes them more practical, durable and rust resistant. Oairse Galvanised Planter in different types to meet your decoration needs.

Decorative Planter Size - Flowers bucket Contain 3 different size galvanized pots: D-16.5cm x H-17cm, D-13.5cm x H-14cm, D-12cm x H-11cm. These flower pots indoor are suitable for dried flowers, silk flowers, and small potted plants in balcony. Different color zinc plant pots with different plants and flowers brings you a good mood and gorgeous environment.

Great for Small Plant - These outdoor planter is great for small, trailing or clump forming plants, hold colorful flowers, Violas, herbs, peppers, strawberry, etc. Give your garden fence a fresh look.

Multiple Application - Plant pots indoor with any decorations, not only for plants and flowers, but can also be as a storage basket. Will add style and color to your home, desk, balcony, windows, wall, railings, fences, gardens or any place indoors and outdoors, embellishing the atmosphere of a beautiful home.
